messages.content: Build a typed event-bus ReplaySubject in RxJS v7 that buffers the last 5 domain events so late subscribers get recent history.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to replay only the last 2 values to late subscribers? Show a minimal example.
Implement a typed log buffer in RxJS v7 using ReplaySubject so a DevTools panel attaching later still sees the last 50 log lines.
Explain briefly how ReplaySubject works in RxJS v7, then show a working typed implementation for a notification-history stream.
Build an auth-token history stream in RxJS v7 that replays the last 3 tokens (current + two previous) to new subscribers with strict types.
Write an RxJS v7 module that exposes an error-stream. Constraints: keep the last 20 errors for late subscribers, strict types, no `any`, expose only a read-only Observable.
How do I replay values from a ReplaySubject only if they're less than 60 seconds old? Show a minimal RxJS v7 example.
Build a CPU-metrics stream in RxJS v7 that retains the last 60 samples so a chart component mounting mid-session can render a full minute of history.
Implement a chat-message history feed in RxJS v7 with strict types — no `any`, all events typed, using ReplaySubject so joiners see the last 20 messages.
Explain the difference between BehaviorSubject and ReplaySubject(1), then show a correct ReplaySubject implementation for caching the last-fetched config.
Build a shell-like command-history stream in RxJS v7 using ReplaySubject that retains the last 100 commands with typed entries.
What happens if I construct a ReplaySubject with no bufferSize argument in RxJS v7? Show a minimal example.
Build a WebSocket-like message stream in RxJS v7 where a UI component attaching mid-session can backfill the last 25 messages.
Write an RxJS v7 module that exposes a user-action feed. Constraints: ReplaySubject with a 30-second window, strict types, expose read-only Observable.
Build a toast-notification stream in RxJS v7 using ReplaySubject(3) so a late-mounting ToastHost sees the three most recent toasts.
Show that every new subscriber to a ReplaySubject receives the full buffer independently, in RxJS v7.
Build a feature-flag stream in RxJS v7 using ReplaySubject(1) so modules loading after the first fetch can react to the current flag set synchronously.
Build a typed logging-tap operator chain in RxJS v7 that logs next/error/complete side effects without transforming the stream.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to observe next/error/complete on a stream without changing it? Show a minimal example.
Implement a reusable typed `logTap<T>(label)` operator in RxJS v7 using tap with the object form.
Explain briefly how tap differs from map in RxJS v7, then show a typed tap({ next, error, complete }) example.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that emits HTTP responses. Constraints: use tap({ next, error, complete }) to record metrics, strict types, no any.
Implement a user-event pipeline in RxJS v7 with strict types — every tap handler and every operator typed, no `any`.
Build a debug-probe operator in RxJS v7 that taps a stream with object-form next/error/complete and returns the same Observable type.
How do I log errors from a stream without swallowing them in RxJS v7? Minimal example, please.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that audits a stream of commands. Constraints: tap with object form, strict typed audit record, no side effects in map.
Explain where to place tap in a pipeline and then show a minimal RxJS v7 example using tap({ next, error, complete }).
Build an analytics-reporting operator in RxJS v7 that uses tap with object form to send page-view events to an analytics sink.
How do I run cleanup code exactly when a stream completes in RxJS v7? Minimal example.
Show that the tap observer object form in RxJS v7 allows partial handlers — implement a pipeline with only next and error, no complete.
Write a tracing middleware for RxJS v7. Constraints: reusable operator, typed, uses tap({ next, error, complete }) and leaves the stream type unchanged.
Build an RxJS v7 pipeline that uses two tap({ next, error, complete }) blocks at different points to observe before and after a map.
Explain briefly how tap interacts with retry in RxJS v7, then show a minimal typed example with tap({ next, error, complete }).
Build a telemetry-capture operator in RxJS v7 using tap with the object form for counts, error sampling, and completion marking. Strict types.
